features: UK to Australia Plug Adapter with 20W USB C Ports: Australian adaptor plug with fast 20W USB C port. 20W USBC port offers fast charging speed for phone, power bank and other devices.
Australian Plug Adaptor: Suitable for Australia, New Zealand, China, Fiji, Argentina, Cook Islands, Kiribati, Nauru, Papua New Guinea, Samoa, Solomon, Tonga, Tuvalu, Uzbekistan etc.

Lightweight and Compact: Travel adapter is compact and lightweight. Europe adapter plug is portable and saves space in your suitcase without need for extension lead. When multiple devices are used together, they do not interfere with each other.

Safe and Reliable: Australia plug adapter has a safety system that combines over-current regulation, over-voltage regulation, temperature control and more to keep you and your device safe when in use.
What You Get: Australian Plug Adaptor with 1 USB C and 2 USB A ports.
description: Product Description UK to AUS Travel Adapter 1 UK Socket + 1 Type C + 2 USB A Ports, can charge your 4 devices at the same time. 20W USB C port offers fast charging speed for phone, power bank and other devices. Cyzbim UK to Australia Plug Adaptor 4 in 1 Australian/China/New Zealand Travel Adapter Plug with USBC and 2 USB Ports Brand: Cyzbim Color：White and Gray Input Voltage: AC 100V-240V 50/60Hz 1.2A UK Sockets: 250V 10A(2500W Max) USB C Output: 5V/3A, 9V/2.22A, 12V/1.67A USB Output: 5V/2.4A Product Dimension: 32* 60 * 90mm This AU plug adapter is used to connect devices with standard UK plugs and Australia socket (type I) 4 in 1 Type I AUS Adapter Equipped with UK to Australia/China/New Zealand Socket and 20W Type C Port and 2 USB A Ports, you could charger your phone, pad, tablets at full speed at the same time. 20W USB C Ports AUS travel adaptor with 20W USBC and 2 USB A ports can charge 3 devices simultaneously without the need for more adapters. USB C port provides fast and efficient charging of devices. Durable and Safe Travel adapter plug has a safety system that combines over-current regulation, over-voltage regulation, temperature control and more to keep you and your device safe when in use. Compact and Portable UK to Australian adapter plug is portable and saves space in your suitcase without need for extension lead. When multiple devices are used together, they do not interfere with each other. Cyzbim travel adapter plug can be used in these countries: Australia, New Zealand, China, Fiji, Argentina, Cook Islands, Kiribati, Nauru, Papua New Guinea, Samoa, Solomon, Tonga, Tuvalu, Uzbekistan and more countries.
